steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage opens with “While,” signaling a contrast: most animals cannot pass somatic mutations to offspring, but elkhorn coral apparently does. The blank describes what this exception to the general rule represents.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Anomaly specifically means something that deviates from what is standard or expected—which is exactly what the coral's ability to pass somatic mutations represents, breaking the general pattern. The other three describe different concepts that don't capture this meaning. That matches choice C — C is correct.
